scripts.deploy:prod: cd ../.. && node scripts/check-prod-secret.mjs && node scripts/build-deploy.mjs && node scripts/apply-d1-migrations.mjs orange-replay-idx-00-prod --env production --env-file apps/worker/wrangler.production.env --remote && vp exec --filter @orange-replay/worker -- wrangler deploy --env production --env-file wrangler.production.env --minify && node scripts/smoke-prod-api.mjs
scripts.deploy:prod:dry-run: cd ../.. && node scripts/build-deploy.mjs && vp exec --filter @orange-replay/worker -- wrangler deploy --env production --env-file wrangler.production.env --dry-run --outdir dist/prod-dry-run
